sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39849" key="e)pikou/rios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπικούρ-ιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n39849.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">succouring</tr_>, epith. of deities, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:8:41:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.41.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
